completed_work: Computed admission summary telemetry in latest-context manifest assembly.
Rendered admission summary in context-pack Markdown.
Verified with full pytest suite: 175 passed.
key_decisions: Admission summary telemetry is manifest metadata only; no selection or cap behavior changed yet.
Track admit, admit_with_warning, and excluded_by_policy counts as the first C ergonomics baseline.
next_actions: Add admit_with_warning cap/demotion policy for latest-context assembly.
risks: Admission telemetry is now visible, but warning-admitted items are not capped or demoted yet.
summary_text: AI-Lab completed the first C ergonomics micro-slice after the B-min prompt telemetry shim. ContextPackManifest now has optional admission_summary telemetry. The schema validates telemetry keys and non-negative integer counts, serializes the summary, and keeps it optional for backward compatibility. context_pack_builder.py now computes manifest-level counts for admit, admit_with_warning, and excluded_by_policy using selected items and policy exclusions. context_pack_renderer.py now renders the admission summary in prompt-ready Markdown. Tests cover schema validation, serialization, builder computation, and renderer output. The full suite passed with 175 tests. No retrieval, cap, or selection behavior was changed in this slice.
